atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he's doing really good.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he is ready to quit smoking.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states he started smoking in high school.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he now smokes a pack and a half a day.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he smokes his first cigarette within an hour of waking up.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports increased stress levels due to work.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the impending arrival of his daughter.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he tried to quit cold turkey a year ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he relapsed due to stressful work situations.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's hemoglobin A1c will be ordered for his next blood draw.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure is 128/88 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart rate is 68 bpm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Respiratory rate is 16 breaths per minute.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Oxygen saturation is 98% on room air.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to start the patient with a 21 milligram nicotine patch

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to decrease the dosage over time

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends setting a quit date for next Monday

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will be with the patient every step of the way to help them quit smoking

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician wants the patient to consider meditation or yoga to help manage stress

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will order a follow-up appointment in two weeks

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suggests the patient keep an eye on any handouts received today
